# nlohmann/json 3.11.3

This directory vendors the single-header distribution of nlohmann/json 3.11.3.

- Source release: https://github.com/nlohmann/json/releases/tag/v3.11.3
- Vendored file: `json.hpp` from the official v3.11.3 release asset
- Upstream license: MIT, reproduced in `LICENSE.MIT`

The normal Irys+Ion build performs no network download for JSON.
